title: Phase 18: PSM 0x0010 sub-record family decoder
objective: Decode the 638 cross-fixture PSM type 0x0010 sub-record family that is referenced from JStyleOverride / GraphicGroup tails, using IDA-confirmed class identity and conservative typed DTO.
evidence: Initial scaffold created; critical documents still require Plannotator gate approval.

summary: 638 cross-fixture hits (DWG-0201=183, DWG-0202=133, 工艺管道-1=315, A01=7). Size distribution is highly polymorphic: 工艺管道-1 dominated by 31B (182), DWG-0201 by 70B (53)/76B (24)/74B (11)/86B (11), DWG-0202 by 13B (22)/43B (16)/45B (8). Sample payloads show heterogeneous sub-kinds — some carry IEEE 754 doubles (coordinate pairs), others carry leading discriminators like '02 00 01 00 ...'. Confirms AGENTS.md hypothesis: 0x0010 is a polymorphic sub-record family, not a fixed-layout primitive.

Phase 18 goal package drafted. Strategy: audit-only mirroring Phase 15 GraphicGroup template. Target: 638 cross-fixture sub-record audit DTOs (DWG-0201=183, DWG-0202=133, 工艺管道-1=315, A01=7), no PidGraphicKind variant, no sub-kind field naming, no IDA work. Slice A-H = inventory / parser / model+schema / cluster / ratchet test / panic-safety / changelog / gates. Pending user gate before /goal execution; plannotator CLI not on Windows so review uses Cursor AskQuestion as gate surface.

Phase 15 GraphicGroup audit-only template mirror points identified across 8 files: src/parsers/sheet_records.rs (constants L1987-1996, DTO+decoders L3104-3222), src/model.rs (SheetGeometry field L902, DTO+From L1304-1334), src/streams/cluster.rs (import L12, decode call L270-272, empty check L288, assignment L304), src/cfb/reader.rs (test fixture L713), src/geometry.rs (6 test fixture inits L1254,1349,1482,1568,1625,1702), src/schema.rs (default needles), tests/parser_panic_safety.rs (adversarial matrix), tests/parse_real_files.rs (graphic_group_decoder_ratchets_fixture_counts_and_header_fields). KEY FINDING: Phase 15 uses 6-byte PSM header (type_word + bytes_to_follow), NOT the 18-byte IGDS header used by Phase 14 typed primitives. PSM 0x0010 probe also uses 6-byte header → DTO has NO oid field (corrected brief.md/plan.md/goal-prompt.md accordingly).

Parser DTO SheetSubRecord0x0010Decoded + decode_sub_records_0x0010 + decode_sub_record_0x0010_at + 3 public consts (PSM_TYPE_CODE_SUB_RECORD_0X0010, SUB_RECORD_0X0010_MIN/MAX_BYTES_TO_FOLLOW). 12 parser unit tests all green: canonical decode, decoded_at returns Some, wrong type_code rejected, zero/below-min/oversized bytes_to_follow rejected, truncated payload rejected, empty input handled, panic-safe on short/random/all-zero/all-FF, back-to-back records, type_flags preserved.

Model DTO DecodedSubRecord0x0010Record (mirrors parser DTO; no oid field due to 6-byte header) + From impl + JsonSchema derive + SheetGeometry::decoded_sub_records_0x0010 field. Schema ratchet needles DecodedSubRecord0x0010Record + decoded_sub_records_0x0010 added; 8 schema tests all green.

cluster.rs imports DecodedSubRecord0x0010Record + decode_sub_records_0x0010; sheet pipeline populates decoded_sub_records_0x0010 collection; empty-sheet branch checks new collection. cfb/reader.rs test fixture initialized. src/geometry.rs 6 test fixtures synced. cargo build --workspace --all-targets passes.

Cross-fixture ratchet test green. probe (non-advancing scan, double-counts overlaps) reported 638; this decoder uses advancing scan (Phase 15 GraphicGroup template) and emits 582 non-overlapping records. Updated brief.md/plan.md/verification.md/goal-prompt.md/CHANGELOG.md to reflect 582 baseline.
parser_panic_safety adversarial matrix entries added for decode_sub_records_0x0010 + decode_sub_record_0x0010_at. Both panic_safety tests green (2/2).

CHANGELOG.md Phase 18 entry written (~80 lines): rationale, fixture counts, additions list, audit-only design choices, Future Work. AGENTS.md updated to reflect 0x0010 audit-only landing + design choices + Phase 19 deferred items.

results.test: ok 849 lib unit (Phase 17=837 + 12 sub_record) + 89 parse_real_files integration (Phase 17=88 + 1 ratchet) + others, 0 failed

summary: Phase 14 (GLine2d=3, igLine2d=284, igLineString2d=119, igPoint2d=146, igTextBox=142, igSymbol2d=27) + Phase 15 (GraphicGroup=352) + Phase 16 (JStyleOverride=98, Annotation Decoded emission) + Phase 17 (PrimitiveArc surface fully removed) baselines all preserved as part of full workspace test run.
